name: pie-chart
description: Unified pie chart component supporting all variations: basic, donut, stacked, label, legend, donut-text, donut-active, interactive, and separator-none configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data items for the pie slices. Each item should have 'value' (number) and 'name' (string). Example: [{value: 275, name: 'Desktop'}, {value: 200, name: 'Mobile'}]

stackedData.name: stackedData
stackedData.description: Array of configurations for stacked/concentric pie charts. When provided, takes precedence over data. Example: [{name: 'Q1', radius: ['0%', '35%'], data: [...]}]

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Radius of the pie chart. Can be single string for regular pie (e.g., '50%') or array of two strings for donut (e.g., ['40%', '70%']). Default: '50%'

showLabel.name: showLabel
showLabel.description: Whether to show labels on the slices. Default: false

showLabelLine.name: showLabelLine
showLabelLine.description: Whether to show lines connecting labels to slices. Default: false

labelFormatter.name: labelFormatter
labelFormatter.description: Format string for the labels. Use '{b}' for name, '{c}' for value, '{b}: {c}' for name: value. Example: '{b}: {c}'

labelFontSize.name: labelFontSize
labelFontSize.description: Font size for the labels in pixels. Default: 12

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show a legend. Default: false

legendConfig.name: legendConfig
legendConfig.description: Legend configuration options. Example: {orient: 'horizontal', bottom: '10%', left: 'center'}

centerText.name: centerText
centerText.description: Main text to display in the center (for donut charts). Example: '752'

centerSubtext.name: centerSubtext
centerSubtext.description: Subtitle text below the main center text (for donut charts). Example: 'Visitors'

centerTextFontSize.name: centerTextFontSize
centerTextFontSize.description: Font size for the center main text. Default: 24

centerSubtextFontSize.name: centerSubtextFontSize
centerSubtextFontSize.description: Font size for the center subtitle. Default: 14

selectedOffset.name: selectedOffset
selectedOffset.description: Distance to offset selected slices in pixels. Default: 10

selectedMode.name: selectedMode
selectedMode.description: Whether to enable selection mode. Can be true, false, 'single', or 'multiple'. Default: false

gap.name: gap
gap.description: Gap between slices in degrees. Set to 0 for no separator. Default: undefined (uses ECharts default)

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 400

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']
